name: Apples Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the water and sugar in a bowl.
2. Crush the soda crackers and add them to the mixture.
3. Add the margarine, cream of tartar, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
4. Pour the mixture into an unbaked pie crust.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until golden brown.
